evals.prompt: Show me all open PRs targeting the main branch in drovacorp/interface on bitbucket, I want to see who authored each one and when it was last updated
evals.expected_output: A curl command that lists PRs with state=OPEN filter on destination.branch.name=main, parsed with jq to show title, author, and updated_on

evals.prompt: Create a pull request from feature/auth-refactor to develop in drovacorp/interface on bitbucket. Add a description about the OAuth2 migration changes and assign reviewer john.doe
evals.expected_output: A curl POST to the pullrequests endpoint with correct JSON body including source branch, destination branch, title, description, and reviewer. Should look up john.doe's account_id first.

evals.prompt: PR #87 in drovacorp/interface on bitbucket looks good — approve it and then squash merge it
evals.expected_output: Two curl commands: first a POST to approve endpoint, then a POST to merge endpoint with merge_strategy=squash

evals.prompt: Review the code changes in PR #123 in drovacorp/interface on bitbucket. It's a big refactor so there might be a lot of files changed. Check the diff and leave comments on anything that looks off.
evals.expected_output: Should use a diffstat-first approach: get diffstat for overview, save full diff to temp file, navigate file-by-file using grep to find boundaries and Read to inspect sections, then post inline comments.

evals.prompt: Can you quickly review PR #15 in drovacorp/interface on bitbucket? It's just a small bugfix, probably only a couple files changed.
evals.expected_output: Should fetch diffstat first to assess size, then fetch the full diff. For a small PR, no need for the heavy save-to-disk pattern.

evals.prompt: I want to list my open PRs on bitbucket but I haven't set up any credentials yet. How do I get started?
evals.expected_output: Should mention API tokens (not app passwords), point to Profile > Account Settings > Security, mention BITBUCKET_USERNAME and BITBUCKET_API_TOKEN env vars, and note that app passwords are deprecated.
